text: Hey, I just wanted to check in on you. I know you have a lot going on and you tend to push through even when you're running on empty, but I hope you'll give yourself permission to slow down a little today. Rest isn't a reward you have to earn — it's something you genuinely need, and you deserve it. Even just stepping away for a bit, taking a breath, maybe lying down for a while — it all matters more than you might think. The work will still be there. The to-do list will survive. But you're more important than any of it, and I'd really love for you to take care of yourself. So please, if there's any way to carve out some quiet time today, do it. I'm rooting for you, always.
